seoTitle: Hatfield vs Havilah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hatfield and Havilah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hatfield and Havilah.
heading: Hatfield vs Havilah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hatfield, New South Wales and Havilah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hatfield has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Havilah (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hatfield or Havilah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hatfield has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Havilah scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hatfield scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Havilah scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hatfield or Havilah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hatfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
